info.title: IBM Business Automation Workflow Case REST Interface
info.description: IBM Business Automation Workflow Case REST resources representing definitions and instances of Cases, Activitiess, and related objects.

post.summary: Obtain IBM Business Automation Workflow CSRF prevention token
post.description: Obtain a CSRF prevention token and optionally refresh the user's group membership information.

parameters.name: login_request
parameters.description: Mandatory parameter that allows you to specify whether the caller's group membership data is refreshed

201.description: The request was processed successfully and returned a new CSRF token

parameters.name: BPMCSRFToken
parameters.description: The token used for preventing Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) in IBM Business Automation Workflow REST APIs

post.summary: Deploy and register Custom Widget or Custom Extension package
post.description: Imports and registers the custom widgets or extensions package with the case components. Registers the plug-in for the widgets or extensions package with the IBM Content Navigator server. If an EAR file is included in the package, it is deployed to the web application server.

NotFound.description: The specified resource was not found

login_request.title: Login Request
login_request.description: Request object for creating a new CSRF token

refresh_groups.description: Flag that indicates whether the current user's group membership should be refreshed in IBM Business Automation Workflow database.

requested_lifetime.description: Requested token lifetime in seconds (positive integer). Must be smaller than the maximum lifetime 7200.

csrf_token.title: Cross Site Request Forgery protection token
csrf_token.description: Token required by IBM Business Automation Workflow REST APIs to prevent cross-site request forgery attacks.
